definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="173" y="121"><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">show_tooltips</field><field name="comment">If disabled, extra data from the mod will not show up in item tooltips.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">Show Item Tooltips</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">shut_up</field><field name="comment">If enabled, radiation counters/detectors will not click when you're being irradiated.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">Make Counters Shut Up</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">click_rate</field><field name="comment">Controls how fast counters click. Higher numbers make more clicks.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Counter Click Rate</field><field name="value">300</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">click_pitch</field><field name="comment">Controls the pitch of counter clicks. Higher numbers mean higher pitch.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Counter Click Pitch</field><field name="value">0.8</field></block></value><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">Radiation Bar</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">show_scale</field><field name="comment">If disabled, radiation counters will not show the extra overlay in the bottom-left of the screen.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">Show Radiation Scale</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">bar_x</field><field name="comment">Controls the horizontal position of the radiation bar, from the left side of the screen.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Radiation Bar X Position</field><field name="value">100</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">bar_y</field><field name="comment">Controls the vertical position of the radiation bar, from the top of the screen.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Radiation Bar Y Position</field><field name="value">0</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">bar_width</field><field name="comment">Controls the visual horizontal scale of the radiation bar. The actual width will be the texture width multiplied by this number.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Radiation Bar Width</field><field name="value">1</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">bar_height</field><field name="comment">Controls the visual height of the radiation bar. The actual height will be the texture height multiplied by this number.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Radiation Bar Height</field><field name="value">1</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">bar_tex</field><field name="comment">Sets the texture of the radiation bar.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_text_variable"><field name="name">Radiation Bar Texture</field><field name="value">radioactive:textures/radbar.png</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">radbar_bg</field><field name="comment">If disabled, the radiation bar's background will not show.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">Show Background</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">bar_bg</field><field name="comment">Sets the texture of the radiation bar's background. Should be the same size as the radiation bar itself.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_text_variable"><field name="name">Radiation Bar Background Texture</field><field name="value">radioactive:textures/radbar_bg.png</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
